title: About the Platform

meta.line1: Information page about the TyPlace platform.
meta.line2: The current version is published on this page.

intro: TyPlace is an online platform for posting listings, entering into transactions between users, and using safe transaction tools for digital goods and services.

section1.title: 1. What TyPlace is
section1.p1: The TyPlace platform is intended for interaction between users who sell and buy digital goods and services.
section1.p2: TyPlace provides an interface for posting listings, communicating through chat, creating orders, paying for a specific transaction, support, and resolving disputed situations.

section2.title: 2. How the platform works
section2.l2: purchasing digital goods and services through the platform interface;
section2.l3: paying for a specific order and using the safe transaction mechanism;
section2.l4: chat, reviews, support, disputes, and other related service functions.

section3.title: 3. Platform status
section3.p1: TyPlace is a platform and information intermediary that provides users with technical tools for interaction and entering into transactions.
section3.p2: The platform does not act as the seller of digital goods and services under user listings, is not an electronic wallet or a service for freely storing user funds, and does not become a party to a transaction between users unless otherwise expressly stated in отдельные service terms.

section4.title: 4. Security and control
section4.p1: To improve security, the platform may use various protection and control measures, including:
section4.l1: the safe transaction mechanism and holding the amount for a specific order until the transaction is completed, refunded, or resolved in a dispute;
section4.l2: a support request and dispute review system;
section4.l3: moderation, anti-fraud checks, and restrictions in case of suspicious activity;
section4.l4: technical action logs and internal security measures.

section5.title: 5. International nature of use
section5.p1: The platform may be used by users from different countries. The user is solely responsible for complying with the laws of their jurisdiction, as well as the rules of the digital services, games, and platforms to which the subject matter of the transaction may relate.
